title: KryptoniteActiveEpics
description: Schema for <skill-path>/data/active.json — maps a project-id to its currently active epic slug. Resume detection reads this on every workflow start; an entry's absence means the project has no active epic (either fresh or all archived).

active.description: Keyed by project-id (12-char hash). Value is the slug of the currently active epic for that project. Omitting a key (or setting it to null) means no active epic.

oneOf.description: The slug of the active epic (matches an {EPIC} directory under data/{PROJECT}/).
Explicitly no active epic — equivalent to omitting the key.
